label: Neon Tide
description: A modular example theme loaded from the themes folder.

variables.app-background: radial-gradient(circle at 12% 10%, rgba(91, 255, 235, 0.18), transparent 22%), radial-gradient(circle at 85% 14%, rgba(38, 127, 255, 0.18), transparent 22%), linear-gradient(180deg, #07111e 0%, #08101a 45%, #04070d 100%)

extraCss: {{selector}} .workbench { background: linear-gradient(var(--board-line) 1px, transparent 1px), linear-gradient(90deg, var(--board-line) 1px, transparent 1px), radial-gradient(circle at top, var(--board-glow), transparent 24%), linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(7, 18, 28, 0.94), rgba(4, 9, 14, 0.99)); background-size: 36px 36px, 36px 36px, auto, auto; }
